projects.title: CarbonKerma
projects.subTitle: A blockchain-based web application
projects.description: CarbonKerma is the first carbon credit trading platform in the world that guarantees measured, verified, regulated, high-quality carbon credits. Where each ton of carbon dioxide (CO2) is represented as a digital token, CKT, on a one-for-one basis, ensures the integrity and traceability of the traded carbon

projects.title: Token Launcher
projects.subTitle: Decentralized App for Token Management
projects.description: Easily launch and manage your token with Token Launcher. Deploy, enable trading, create, lock, or burn liquidity, adjust fees, and more—all in one streamlined platform.

projects.title: Fomo Party
projects.subTitle: Decentralized Token Platform
projects.description: A platform that allows users to create and launch tokens instantly on Ethereum. It simplifies token deployment, enabling seamless trading with built-in liquidity and automated market-making features.

moreProjects.title: Network Share
moreProjects.subTitle: File Sharing Web Application
moreProjects.description: A web application for sharing files quickly and securely through a simple browser-based workflow.

moreProjects.title: LW3 CRM
moreProjects.subTitle: CRM Platform
moreProjects.description: LW3 CRM is a full-stack customer relationship management system focused on outreach, investor/mandate workflows, LP universe management, and compliant email-driven engagement.

moreProjects.title: Zquence App
moreProjects.subTitle: Secure Transaction Platform
moreProjects.description: Zquence is an all-in-one platform designed to help users complete secure transactions with confidence. It combines document management, identity verification, and escrow services into a single solution.

moreProjects.title: GenexAI
moreProjects.subTitle: Automated Evidence Review Platform
moreProjects.description: GenexAI is an AI platform for automated evidence review, helping teams accelerate abstract screening, full-text evaluation, and structured data extraction.

moreProjects.title: Xaply AI
moreProjects.subTitle: AI Executive Assistant Platform
moreProjects.description: Xaply provides AI and human-assisted executive scheduling automation across email, WhatsApp, and calendar workflows.

moreProjects.title: Web3 BigNumber
moreProjects.subTitle: Node Package
moreProjects.description: Web3 BigNumber is an extensive library for managing large number for Javascript and Node.js. Useful for web3 development.

moreProjects.title: Web3 Errors Extract
moreProjects.subTitle: Node Package
moreProjects.description: An npm package used to retrieve and display error messages from EVM-based web3 transactions.

moreProjects.title: Web3Sol
moreProjects.subTitle: Web Application
moreProjects.description: This web app lets users interact with smart contracts deployed on EVM-based blockchains. Users only need to provide the ABI and the contract address to call functions from these smart contracts. Will add more features in future updates.

moreProjects.title: AI Crypto Bot
moreProjects.subTitle: Telegram Bot
moreProjects.description: Trade, create, and manage crypto effortlessly with an AI-powered Telegram bot. Automate transactions, analyze markets, and stay ahead.

moreProjects.title: Drift Token
moreProjects.subTitle: Decentralized Web App
moreProjects.description: Drift is a Web3 game studio with benefits for all. Gamers use DRIFT for NFT skins and custom features, while stakers earn and boost liquidity from game revenue.

moreProjects.title: ExpertTexting Plugin
moreProjects.subTitle: WordPress Plugin
moreProjects.description: The official ExpertTexting plugin for WordPress. With this plugin, you can add the ability of sending SMS & notifications to your WordPress newsletter subscribers or users, and keep them updated on the latest posts and updates.

archive.title: Randomize Files
archive.subTitle: Node Package
archive.description: Randomize Files is a tool designed to shuffle and randomize files, especially useful for creating unique NFTs (Non-Fungible Tokens). It helps ensure that each file or digital asset is distinct and unique, making it ideal for artists and developers working on NFT projects.

archive.title: Message Segment Calculator

archive.description: A tool that helps you determine how many segments your text message will use when sent. It considers both regular text and special characters (Unicode), which can affect the length and number of segments.
